headline: Ulta Beauty (ULTA) Valuation Check After Recent Share Price Volatility
summary: Ulta Beauty (ULTA) is back in focus after recent share price volatility, with the stock down about 20% over the past month and 13% over the past 3 months. See our latest analysis for Ulta Beauty. That recent 20% one month share price decline sits against a much stronger backdrop, with Ulta Beauty posting a 46.13% one year total shareholder return, so recent momentum looks to be fading after a strong run. If Ulta’s recent swings have you thinking about where else growth stories could come...
